name: codex-mistral-ocr
description: Codex skill and MCP server for parsing PDFs with Mistral OCR latest.

interface.shortDescription: Parse PDFs into searchable Markdown using Mistral OCR.
interface.longDescription: Adds an MCP server and skill so Codex can OCR local or public PDFs with Mistral OCR latest, cache Markdown, search results, and read selected pages.
defaultPrompt: Use Mistral PDF OCR to read ./paper.pdf and summarize it with page citations.
Use Mistral PDF OCR to extract tables from ./report.pdf.
